thesis_profile.market_mechanism: Phase 1b extension of v91 (xs_minimal_v6): adds 3 B-batch alternative factor candidates orthogonal to the v91 9-factor baseline. Per phase_1c_factor_analysis on the v92 panel, 11 B-batch candidates were screened by full-panel rank IC + VIF; 3 passed |IC| >= 0.04 with VIF < 5: stress_liq_conc_iv (IC=-0.060, VIF=1.66, n=715, stress propagation), unwind_liq_imb_xs (IC=-0.050, VIF=2.41, n=1094, cross-section unwind), disagree_tt_retail (IC=+0.037, VIF=1.37, n=1090, smart-money vs retail flow disagreement, fills mechanism gap not present in v91). Other 8 candidates discarded for IC < 0.04 or |t-stat| < 4. unwind_liq_dh dropped despite |IC|=0.046 because corr(unwind_liq_dh, unwind_liq_imb_xs) = -0.71. v91 9 weights kept unchanged; new 3 weights from full-panel IC magnitude; absolute sum is 1.11 (B-revision: first v92 cycle with normalized weights showed WF sharpe regression 0.846 to 0.677, so keeping v91 magnitudes preserves baseline alpha contribution). v93 CANDIDATE ISSUE (deferred from this batch): v91 IC pruning over-aggressively removed two strong signals — intraday_realized_vol_4h_to_1d_smooth_20 (IC=-0.104, VIF=15.12) and distance_to_high_20 (IC=+0.098, VIF=4.24). VIF dominated over IC magnitude. v93 should explore VIF-aware GLS residualization or PCA-based combination instead of hard VIF threshold drop, to recover IC from the strongest single-factor signals.
thesis_profile.directional_claim: rank top-20 liquid perp-covered names by 12 z-score factors (v91 9 IC-pruned + v92 3 B-batch alternatives). Expected: rank IC >= 0.18 (above v91 0.165, modest because new factors weaker than v91 strongest), walk-forward median sharpe >= 0.90 (above v91 0.846), regime worst median sharpe >= -1.8. Critical assumption: 3 new factors maintain orthogonality and do not dilute existing alpha. If realized rank IC < 0.17 or WF median sharpe < 0.85, the new factors are net-negative and v92 should be rolled back.
